title: Race (Species)
description: PC species definition. PHB 2024 uses the term 'species'; the engine uses 'race' for the entity-type key (matches stable_id prefix r_ and the schema/content/races/ directory). Each race contributes size, speed, special senses, baked-on damage resistances, racial trait flags (consumed at runtime by engine.core.racial_traits), and optional bonuses applied at PC-build time (extra skill proficiencies). Shipped in PR #75 (the 4 SRD species) + schema formalized in PR #84.

creature_type.description: Creature type for damage/condition interactions (Fiend / Undead → Divine Smite bonus dice, etc.). Most PC species are humanoid; future Aasimar/Tiefling-shape species could be celestial/fiend.

speed.description: Movement speeds in feet per round. walk is required; other speeds are optional.

darkvision_range_ft.description: Darkvision range in feet (0 = no darkvision). Common values: 60 for Dwarf/Elf, 120 for some lineages.

racial_traits.description: Trait ids stamped onto Actor.racial_traits at PC build. Runtime sites (query_save_modifiers, _attack_roll Lucky reroll, etc.) read this list to gate effects. See engine/core/racial_traits.py for the registry of recognized t_ ids and what each does.

damage_resistances.description: Damage types this race resists by default (halved damage). Baked onto template.damage_resistances; _damage applies via existing template-side resistance path. Dwarf's Poison resistance is the canonical SRD example.

damage_immunities.description: Damage types this race is immune to (zero damage). Same template path as damage_resistances.

extra_skill_proficiency_slots.description: How many extra skill proficiencies the PC picks from any list at build time. Human Skillful = 1; future species (Half-Elf-shape) could grant 2. pc_schema reads pc_spec.extra_skill (single skill) when this slot is > 0.

starting_languages.description: Languages all members of this race know. Common is universal; species-specific (Dwarvish, Elvish) listed here. v1 doesn't model languages mechanically.

lineage_options.description: PHB 2014-style lineage variants within a species (Drow / High Elf / Wood Elf for Elf, Hill / Mountain for Dwarf). PHB 2024 mostly removed mechanical lineages, so v1 leaves this empty. Future fixtures could revive lineage-shape variants via this field.
